## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals and priorities for GrowthX's engagement with Webflow to improve developer-focused content and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary focus: Optimize developer.webflow.com content for SEO and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Key goals: Position Webflow as a headless CMS, improve discoverability of integrations/APIs](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Target audience: Professional web developers, with secondary focus on hobbyists/prototypers](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Competitors: WordPress, Contentful, Adobe Experience Manager are top priorities to differentiate against](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Challenges

  - [Manual content creation process is not scalable](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Existing content not optimized for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Missing content for key use cases (e.g. Vite/Vue extensions)](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Some pages not indexed due to client-side JavaScript](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Need to improve tone, formatting, and structure for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

### Expanding Webflow's Perception

  - [Not widely recognized as a headless CMS despite capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Opportunity to highlight power/flexibility of CMS and APIs](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Need content showcasing complex use cases and enterprise implementations](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Educate on migration paths from other CMSs to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

### Developer Audience Insights

  - [Professional developers evaluating for large implementations](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Hobbyists/prototypers using for rapid development](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2348.0)
  - [Agencies have major influence on CMS selection for enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Developer word-of-mouth and conference speakers shape perceptions](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2816.0)

### Content Strategy Ideas

  - [Create programmatic content for long-tail integration/API topics](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Develop migration guides addressing common pain points](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
  - [Showcase community examples/galleries of MCP server usage](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
  - [Optimize for developer influencers and conference speakers](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2816.0)
  - [Improve API documentation to win developer trust](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

### Measurement and Baselines

  - [Establish baseline metrics for developer.webflow.com content](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [Analyze search console data, Zendesk tickets for content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
  - [Track improvements in search rankings for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2238.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to request access to Search Console, Zendesk data](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Webflow to share additional docs, research on migrations](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2276.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct technical SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Develop initial content strategy hypothesis for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review strategy and kick off execution](https://fathom.video/share/k8jkzCoZtTYxnucqsHe5XczTpiiJweJb?tab=summary&timestamp=3298.0)
